title: Sheffield Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Sheffield, with a Z-Score of -3.03. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Sheffield are extremely cold, with a high Z-Score indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The city is experiencing a critical level of cold, with 11.6 HDD GG and 0.0 CDD GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 82%, with a gentle breeze of 5.0 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
